steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Divide by 8: $|x-8|=6$. So $x-8=6$ or $x-8=-6$, giving $x=14$ or $x=2$.

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content:
Add: $14+2=16$. (Shortcut: $|x-a|=b$ gives sum $2a=16$.)

The answer is C.

Both solutions are valid because an absolute value equation measures distance from 8, so values 6 units to the left and right both work.
